results.title: Gnosis Self-Awareness via Internal Circuits (2025/12)
results.judge_reason: Decodes hidden-state signals for self-verification; explicitly cited by candidate as different from its efflorescence-token approach.

results.title: Exploiting Internal States for Knowledge Boundary (2025/2)
results.judge_reason: Internal-state-based knowledge-boundary perception; reads internal states rather than embedding migrating calibration tokens in training data.

results.title: Conformal Prediction via Internal Representations (2026/4)
results.judge_reason: Layer-wise conformal scoring from internal representations; post-hoc nonconformity, not training-data salt migration.

results.title: Representation Engineering Survey (2025/2)
results.judge_reason: General representation-engineering survey; not specifically about efflorescence-style calibration salt tokens.

verdict_reason: Two source-domain hits (Wikipedia and Met Museum) each match >=2 content_words (Egyptian faience, efflorescence glaze, natron alkali / salt migration). Strict OR rule triggers FAIL since total_hits >= 1. The source-side keywords are too specific and well-documented to evade overlap.
notes: Verifier scored independently without consulting other-agent outputs. Source-side terms ('Egyptian faience', 'efflorescence glaze', 'natron alkali') are nearly tautological hits against any Egyptian-faience reference; this is a content_words composition risk.
